Name: [PRE-SALES] <Company> - <Use case / team>
Description: Owner: CE | Replace placeholder with actual company and use case

Name: ARR Potential confirmed & entered in Asana field
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 1 | Set ARR Potential custom field on this task. Required for Goal 1 tracking. Estimate based on team size and license tier.

Name: Vector Opportunity / Workload URL added
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Day 1 | Paste the CRM opportunity URL into the Vector Opportunity / Workload custom field on this task

Name: Initial technical discovery call
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 1 | Cover: current dev tooling, team size, pain points, GCA awareness level, key stakeholders

Name: Document requirements & current stack
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 1 | Record: languages, IDEs, CI/CD, security posture, VPC/proxy requirements, compliance needs

Name: Map requirements to GCA capabilities
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 2 | Identify fit and gaps between customer requirements and GCA features; note competitive context

Name: Identify stakeholders (sponsor / IT / security)
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 2 | Map economic buyer / sponsor / IT admin / security reviewer; confirm decision process

Name: Competitive landscape noted
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 2 | Document any competing tools in evaluation (GitHub Copilot / Cursor / etc.) and CE's differentiation strategy

Name: Assess security & compliance requirements
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 3 | Validate GCA data residency, VPC-SC, audit logging, and approval requirements with customer IT/security

Name: POC scope & success criteria agreed
Description: Owner: CE + Customer | Timing: Week 3-4 | Agree on pilot group size / duration / success metrics / exit criteria before POC starts

Name: Decision: Start POC / No Interest / Stalled
Description: Owner: CE | Timing: Week 4 | Update Stage field to POC (triggers auto-project creation via Rule 4), or set Outcome = Closed-Lost / No Interest
